articles.description: A Tottenham fan who has threatened to stop attending matches said it would be "unforgivable" to name Roberto de Zerbi as the club's new manager.
articles.title: Roberto de Zerbi: Spurs fans' anger grows over Italian's appointment

articles.description: Roberto de Zerbi is set to become Tottenham's third boss of the season - with a clear objective for the next two months.
articles.title: Roberto de Zerbi: Seven games to save Tottenham's season

articles.description: Listen to BBC Radio 5 Live commentary, follow text updates, the latest score and match stats as England take on Japan at Wembley.
articles.title: International friendly LIVE: England vs Japan - text updates, radio commentary, stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Fifa president Gianni Infantino says Iran will play their World Cup games in the United States as planned.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: Infantino says Iran will play games in United States as scheduled

articles.description: A cyclist who was killed during the Road World Championships was not found for 82 minutes after a crash, investigators find.
articles.title: Muriel Furrer: Cyclist killed at World Championships not found for 82 minutes

articles.description: Striker Romelu Lukaku could face disciplinary action after Napoli released a statement to say he has ignored a request to return to the club.
articles.title: Romelu Lukaku: Napoli warn they could take action over striker's training no-show

articles.description: BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your questions after the Japanese Grand Prix.
articles.title: F1 Q&A: Verstappen's future, five-week break, how will Mercedes deal with Antonelli & Russell?

articles.description: With 11 Arsenal players withdrawing from international duty, are the Gunners facing an injury crisis or are they simply being cautious?
articles.title: Arsenal injuries: Are Gunners facing a crisis or being cautious?

articles.description: Sports editor Dan Roan analysis the key questions after the IOC announced women's sport categories would only be open to biological females.
articles.title: IOC: The key question for sport after biological female decision

articles.description: Ghana dismiss manager Otto Addo, 72 days before the start of the 2026 World Cup, following a run of defeats.
articles.title: Otto Addo: Ghana sack manager 72 days before World Cup
